meanings.definition: provide a cure for, make healthy again
examples: The treatment cured the boy's acne
The quack pretended to heal patients but never managed to

meanings.definition: prepare by drying, salting, or chemical processing in order to preserve
make (substances) hard and improve their usability

examples: the apricots cure in the sun

meanings.definition: freed from illness or injury; ; ; ; - Normon Cameron
examples: when the recovered patient tries to remember what occurred during his delirium

meanings.definition: (used of rubber) treated by a chemical or physical process to improve its properties (hardness and strength and odor and elasticity)
(used of concrete or mortar) kept moist to assist the hardening
(used of hay e.g.) allowed to dry
(used especially of meat) cured in brine
(used of tobacco) aging as a preservative process (`aged' is pronounced as one syllable)
